title: Studies of the Kinetics Between Chromium Peroxydichromate and Various Acids. Part I. Sulphuric Acid
author: Jagmer Singh
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The kinetics of the reaction between chromium peroxydichromate and sulphuric acid has been studied by Ostwald's isolation method. The total order of the reaction has been found to be 2 and its  mechanism has also been suggested.
steps_raw: The kinetics of the reaction between chromium peroxydichromate and sulphuric acid has been studied by Ostwald's isolation method. The total order of the reaction has been found to be 2 and its  mechanism has also been suggested.
